notes: Can refer to the raw piece of meat prepared for roasting or the finished roasted meat. The plural form is identical to the singular.

sentences.german: Die Mutter hat einen Braten im Ofen.
sentences.english: The mother has a roast in the oven.

sentences.german: Der Braten war so zart, dass er auf der Zunge zerschmolz.
sentences.english: The roast was so tender that it melted on the tongue.
